tier.why_single_source: The folder ALSO holds a same-host (win-dc-233) PowerShell-Operational 4104 log, so a multi-source (Tier-2) build is possible. Built here as Tier-1 Sysmon: the process lineage + collection-output artifacts fully establish the strong/under-triage case. The 4104 script-block log is a documented future multi-source option (needs the classic-format parser).
